basic_details.job_title: NEIGRIHMS Senior Resident Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 55 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS)

important_dates.interview_date: To be published on Institute website

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree or diploma in respective subject recognized by MCI after obtaining MBBS with compulsory internship and registration with State Medical Council
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree or diploma in respective subject recognized by MCI after obtaining MBBS with compulsory internship and registration with State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Rs. 67700 Per Month (Level 11 Pay Matrix entry pay Rs.67700/- per month plus NPA)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NEIGRIHMS Senior Resident Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NEIGRIHMS Senior Resident Doctor posts is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates regarding the walk-in interview dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident Doctor position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Postgraduate degree or diploma in the respective subject recognized by MCI, after obtaining MBBS with compulsory internship and registration with the State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident Doctor posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident Doctor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 55 vacancies available for the Senior Resident Doctor posts across various specializations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident Doctor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67700 per month, which is at Level 11 of the Pay Matrix, plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NEIGRIHMS Senior Resident Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Senior Resident Doctor positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS), Shillong, Meghalaya. The exact venue and time will be published on the institute's website.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents include ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
